label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. So there are these dancers: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. They each start with a partner. Let me write that down first to keep track. At the beginning: - Alice is with Lola - Bob is with Karl - Claire is with Patrick - Dave is with Sam - Eve is with Helga Then there are a series of partner swaps. Let me go through each step one by one. Maybe I should track each person's partner after each swap. Let's start with the initial partners and update them step by step. First swap: Dave and Alice switch partners. So Dave was with Sam, Alice was with Lola. After swapping, Dave will be with Lola, and Alice will be with Sam. Let me note that down. After first swap: - Alice: Sam - Dave: Lola Others remain the same for now: - Bob: Karl - Claire: Patrick - Eve: Helga Second swap: Eve and Alice switch partners. Eve was with Helga, Alice is currently with Sam. So after swapping, Eve will be with Sam, and Alice will be with Helga. After second swap: - Alice: Helga - Eve: Sam Others: - Bob: Karl - Claire: Patrick - Dave: Lola
